title: The Wealth Alignment Practice
subtitle: A five-part ritual for anchoring wealth as a natural rhythm in daily life
excerpt: A Week 8 ritual from a 12-week money program. The practice has five steps: Prepare, Release, Allow, Integrate, and Anchor. Together they set wealth as the natural cadence of each day, not a distant goal, but the energy your daily actions already carry.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 8 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448). The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A five-step ritual for setting wealth as a steady rhythm in daily life. The five steps are prepare, release, allow, integrate, and anchor. Together they take the body and mind from whatever is here now to a clear, grounded sense that your daily actions and your abundance line up.
Sit quietly. Take a few calm breaths. Picture your day as a sequence of moments, each one carrying peace, clarity, and ease. Morning, work, evening.
Say the following three times, out loud or in your mind:
I am ready to release all chaos, resistance, and inconsistency in how I relate to money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
Say the following three times, out loud or in your mind:
I am ready to align with and allow structure, order, and flow that naturally support wealth in my life. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow breath in, then all the way out, letting any remaining tension go. Picture your daily routine moving in order, with ease: morning, midday, evening. See yourself at each part of the day, organised, unhurried, clear. Spend a minute here.
Write this sentence on paper in your own handwriting, then say it out loud:
This week, I am grateful that my daily actions now reflect the energy of wealth and ease.
Adapted from the Week 8 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
